description: A lot of times I need to do like you know deploy front end deploy Lambda code deploy AWS IAC Please make a location or button for deploy script and add that as a feature so that the AI can know at the end of all of its features if auto deploy was enabled that you know that it would be auto deployed based on the deploy scripts also add the ability on each feature to mark it as auto deploy or deploy and in the settings you should be able to set a default for that. You should have a production deploy scripts and development deploy scripts. Another feature is removing both left sidebar menus so do not include the feature or location there Preferably it would be at the top of the header where workflow and stuff is
title: Add auto-deploy feature with production and development scripts
